slide1.title: Sustainable Farming Cycle in Indonesia
slide1.description: LoopTani connects high-quality agricultural waste with processing industries for a sustainable food future.

slide2.title: Turn Agricultural Waste into New Value
slide2.description: Sell your coffee grounds, rice straw, husks, or organic fertilizer directly to buyers on the LoopTani marketplace.

slide3.title: Farming Education & Field Practice
slide3.description: Hundreds of farming guides, waste processing video demos, and collect LoopPoints as a knowledge contributor.

slide4.title: Green Footprint for Every Transaction
slide4.description: Transparently track reduced CO₂ emissions, protected groundwater, and easily export CSR reports on LoopTani.
